overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence following an eagle flying over a mountain lake and descending into a rocky river canyon. The bird navigates through steep terrain with dense pine forests and snow-capped peaks visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain lake with forested shores and snow-capped peaks

agents.ego_description: eagle flying steadily over the lake toward the distant canyon outlet

entered.detail: tall mountain peak with snow visible on the summit against the cloudy sky
calm dark water reflecting the sky, surrounded by forested shoreline
dense evergreen trees covering the lower mountain slopes
rocky edge where the forest meets the lake water

segments.scene_description: The eagle flies steadily over a calm mountain lake surrounded by dense pine forests. Snow-capped peaks rise in the distance under a partly cloudy sky as the bird maintains altitude heading toward a distant canyon outlet.

scene_state.functional_zone: river canyon entrance with wooden bridge

events.description: eagle banks sharply to the left and begins descending toward the canyon below
wooden bridge spanning the river comes into view ahead

agents.ego_description: banking left and descending into the river canyon, approaching the wooden bridge structure

entered.detail: rustic wooden bridge structure spanning the river canyon
steep-walled canyon with river flowing through the valley floor
steep rock face with sparse vegetation on the canyon edge

segments.scene_description: The eagle banks left and descends from the open lake into the canyon entrance. A wooden bridge becomes visible spanning the river ahead as the bird loses altitude and the canyon walls rise on either side.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow river canyon with steep rock walls

events.description: entering the narrow canyon section flying low between the rock walls
flying at very low altitude close to the water surface

agents.ego_description: flying low through the canyon following the river's winding path between steep rock walls

entered.detail: steep rocky canyon walls rising vertically on the left side of the river
steep rocky canyon walls rising vertically on the right side of the river

segments.scene_description: Now deep in the canyon, the eagle flies low over the rushing river between steep rock walls. The wooden bridge disappears behind as the bird navigates the narrow passage with pine trees visible only on the cliff tops above.

events.description: canyon walls become steeper and more rugged with scattered boulders

agents.ego_description: navigating through the narrow canyon with rugged rocky walls on both sides

entered.detail: vertical rock face with rough texture and minimal vegetation
vertical rock face with rough texture and minimal vegetation

segments.scene_description: The eagle continues through the narrowest section of the canyon where steep rock walls rise on both sides. The river flows rapidly below as the terrain becomes more rugged and enclosed.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a wide, open mountain vista into the claustrophobic depths of a rugged river canyon. It begins with a steady flight over a calm lake surrounded by dense pine forests, with snow-capped peaks visible under a partly cloudy sky. As the eagle banks left, the open horizon narrows and the camera descends toward a canyon entrance, passing over a wooden bridge as the rock walls begin to rise on either side. The scene then shifts deep into the gorge, where the bird flies low over a rushing river while the bridge disappears behind and the pine trees retreat to the distant cliff tops. Finally, the camera navigates the narrowest section of the passage, where the terrain becomes increasingly rugged and the steep rock walls closely enclose the rapidly flowing water below.
